children.heading: Limitation on obligation of funds
children.label: a Limitation on obligation of funds
A
children.text: the Director of the Office of Business Transformation of the Office of the Director of National Intelligence makes a certification described in paragraph (2) with respect to such intelligence community business system transformation; and

children.label: B
children.text: such certification is approved by the board established under subsection (f).

children.label: A
children.text: complies with the enterprise architecture under subsection (b) and such other policies and standards that the Director of National Intelligence considers appropriate; or

children.label: i
children.text: to achieve a critical national security capability or address a critical requirement; or

children.label: ii
children.text: to prevent a significant adverse effect on a project that is needed to achieve an essential capability, taking into consideration any alternative solutions for preventing such adverse effect.

children.label: A
children.text: the amount in effect under such paragraph (1) for the preceding fiscal year (determined after application of this paragraph), plus

children.label: B
children.text: such amount multiplied by the annual percentage increase in the consumer price index (all items; U.S. city average) as of September of the previous fiscal year.

children.heading: Enterprise architecture for intelligence community business systems
children.label: b Enterprise architecture for intelligence community business systems

children.text: The Director of National Intelligence shall, acting through the board established under subsection (f), develop and implement an enterprise architecture to cover all intelligence community business systems, and the functions and activities supported by such business systems. The enterprise architecture shall be sufficiently defined to effectively guide, constrain, and permit implementation of interoperable intelligence community business system solutions, consistent with applicable policies and procedures established by the Director of the Office of Management and Budget.

children.label: i
children.text: comply with all Federal accounting, financial management, and reporting requirements;

children.label: ii
children.text: routinely produce timely, accurate, and reliable financial information for management purposes;

children.label: iii
children.text: integrate budget, accounting, and program information and systems; and

children.label: iv
children.text: provide for the measurement of performance, including the ability to produce timely, relevant, and reliable cost information.

children.label: B
children.text: Policies, procedures, data standards, and system interface requirements that apply uniformly throughout the intelligence community.

children.heading: Responsibilities for intelligence community business system transformation
children.label: c Responsibilities for intelligence community business system transformation
children.text: The Director of National Intelligence shall be responsible for the entire life cycle of an intelligence community business system transformation, including review, approval, and oversight of the planning, design, acquisition, deployment, operation, and maintenance of the business system transformation.

children.heading: Intelligence community business system investment review
children.label: d Intelligence community business system investment review

children.text: The Director of the Office of Business Transformation of the Office of the Director of National Intelligence shall establish and implement, not later than 60 days after , an investment review process for the intelligence community business systems for which the Director of the Office of Business Transformation is responsible.October 7, 2010

children.label: A
children.text: meet the requirements of ; andsection 11312 of title 40

children.label: B
children.text: specifically set forth the responsibilities of the Director of the Office of Business Transformation under such review process.

children.label: A
children.text: Review and approval by an investment review board (consisting of appropriate representatives of the intelligence community) of each intelligence community business system as an investment before the obligation of funds for such system.

children.label: B
children.text: Periodic review, but not less often than annually, of every intelligence community business system investment.

children.label: C
children.text: Thresholds for levels of review to ensure appropriate review of intelligence community business system investments depending on the scope, complexity, and cost of the system involved.

children.label: D
children.text: Procedures for making certifications in accordance with the requirements of subsection (a)(2).

children.heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 112–277, title III, § 310(a)(3)126 Stat. 2475Jan. 14, 2013
children.label: e Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 112–277, title III, § 310(a)(3)126 Stat. 2475Jan. 14, 2013

children.heading: Intelligence community business system transformation governance board
children.label: f Intelligence community business system transformation governance board

children.text: The Director of National Intelligence shall establish a board within the intelligence community business system transformation governance structure (in this subsection referred to as the “Board”).

children.label: A
children.text: recommend to the Director policies and procedures necessary to effectively integrate all business activities and any transformation, reform, reorganization, or process improvement initiatives undertaken within the intelligence community;

children.label: i
children.text: the enterprise architecture developed under subsection (b); and

children.label: ii
children.text: any plans for an intelligence community business systems modernization;

children.label: C
children.text: manage cross-domain integration consistent with such enterprise architecture;

children.label: D
children.text: coordinate initiatives for intelligence community business system transformation to maximize benefits and minimize costs for the intelligence community, and periodically report to the Director on the status of efforts to carry out an intelligence community business system transformation;

children.label: E
children.text: ensure that funds are obligated for intelligence community business system transformation in a manner consistent with subsection (a); and

children.label: F
children.text: carry out such other duties as the Director shall specify.

children.heading: Relation to annual registration requirements
children.label: g Relation to annual registration requirements
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to alter the requirements of section 8083 of the Department of Defense Appropriations Act, 2005 (; ), with regard to information technology systems (as defined in subsection (d) of such section).Public Law 108–287118 Stat. 989

children.heading: Relationship to defense business enterprise architecture
children.label: h Relationship to defense business enterprise architecture
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to exempt funds authorized to be appropriated to the Department of Defense from the requirements of to the extent that such requirements are otherwise applicable.section 2222 of title 10

children.label: A
children.text: the Director of National Intelligence and the Chief Information Officer of the Intelligence Community; and

children.label: B
children.text: the head of the executive agency that contains the element of the intelligence community involved and the chief information officer of that executive agency.

The Director of National Intelligence and the head of the executive agency referred to in paragraph (1)(B) shall enter into a Memorandum of Understanding to carry out the requirements of this section in a manner that best meets the needs of the intelligence community and the executive agency.

children.label: A
children.text: specific milestones and actual performance against specified performance measures, and any revision of such milestones and performance measures; and

children.label: B
children.text: specific actions on the intelligence community business system transformations submitted for certification under such subsection;
identify the number of intelligence community business system transformations that received a certification described in subsection (a)(2); and
describe specific improvements in business operations and cost savings resulting from successful intelligence community business systems transformation efforts.
The term “enterprise architecture” has the meaning given that term in .section 3601(4) of title 44
The terms “information system” and “information technology” have the meanings given those terms in .section 11101 of title 40

The term “intelligence community business system” means an information system, including a national security system, that is operated by, for, or on behalf of an element of the intelligence community, including a financial system, mixed system, financial data feeder system, and the business infrastructure capabilities shared by the systems of the business enterprise architecture, including people, process, and technology, that build upon the core infrastructure used to support business activities, such as acquisition, financial management, logistics, strategic planning and budgeting, installations and environment, and human resource management.

children.label: A
children.text: the acquisition or development of a new intelligence community business system; or

children.label: B
children.text: any significant modification or enhancement of an existing intelligence community business system (other than necessary to maintain current services).
The term “national security system” has the meaning given that term in section 3542 of title 44.1See References in Text note below.1

The term “Office of Business Transformation of the Office of the Director of National Intelligence” includes any successor office that assumes the functions of the Office of Business Transformation of the Office of the Director of National Intelligence as carried out by the Office of Business Transformation on .October 7, 2010
